scripts.scripts:prepare: (pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@bb/scripts --output-logs=none --log-prefix=none --summarize=false >/dev/null 2>&1 || pnpm exec turbo run build --filter=@bb/scripts --output-logs=errors-only --log-prefix=none --summarize=false)
scripts.dev: dotenv -c development -- turbo run dev --ui tui --concurrency 20 --no-update-notifier
scripts.dev:restart: cross-env NODE_ENV=development pnpm run --silent scripts:prepare && cross-env NODE_ENV=development node packages/scripts/dist/commands/request-dev-restart.js both
scripts.dev:restart-server: cross-env NODE_ENV=development pnpm run --silent scripts:prepare && cross-env NODE_ENV=development node packages/scripts/dist/commands/request-dev-restart.js server
scripts.dev:restart-host-daemon: cross-env NODE_ENV=development pnpm run --silent scripts:prepare && cross-env NODE_ENV=development node packages/scripts/dist/commands/request-dev-restart.js host-daemon
scripts.dev:host-daemon: cross-env NODE_ENV=development pnpm run --silent scripts:prepare && cross-env NODE_ENV=development node packages/scripts/dist/commands/run-host-daemon.js --auto-join
scripts.start: cross-env NODE_ENV=production dotenv -c production -- pnpm run --silent scripts:prepare && cross-env NODE_ENV=production dotenv -c production -- node packages/scripts/dist/commands/start-bb.js
scripts.start:host-daemon: cross-env NODE_ENV=production pnpm run --silent scripts:prepare && cross-env NODE_ENV=production node packages/scripts/dist/commands/start-host-daemon.js
scripts.reset: cross-env NODE_ENV=production pnpm run --silent scripts:prepare && cross-env NODE_ENV=production node packages/scripts/dist/commands/reset-bb-data.js
scripts.reset:dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development pnpm run --silent scripts:prepare && cross-env NODE_ENV=development node packages/scripts/dist/commands/reset-bb-data.js
scripts.reset:all: cross-env NODE_ENV=production pnpm run --silent scripts:prepare && cross-env NODE_ENV=production node packages/scripts/dist/commands/reset-bb-data.js --all
scripts.bb: cross-env NODE_ENV=production pnpm run --silent scripts:prepare && cross-env NODE_ENV=production node packages/scripts/dist/commands/run-cli.js
scripts.bb:dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development pnpm run --silent scripts:prepare && cross-env NODE_ENV=development node packages/scripts/dist/commands/run-cli.js
